original_query: SELECT "t5"."JOB" FROM (SELECT "JOB" FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A' GROUP BY "JOB") AS "t5" RIGHT JOIN (SELECT "NAME" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME") AS "t6" ON "t5"."JOB" = "t6"."NAME" GROUP BY "t5"."JOB"

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replace GROUP BY with DISTINCT in subqueries for potentially better performance
Use DISTINCT instead of GROUP BY in subqueries when no aggregation is needed
